scripts.back:init: uv venv --python 3.12 backend/.venv && cd backend && uv add fastapi "uvicorn[standard]" pydantic-settings sqlalchemy asyncpg alembic pyjwt passlib
scripts.back:dev: cd backend && (start http://localhost:8000/docs) && uv run uvicorn src.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.db:makemigrations: cd backend && uv run alembic revision --autogenerate
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && uv run alembic upgrade head
